name: Madison Square Garden Entertainment Corp.
business: Madison Square Garden Entertainment Corp. is a live entertainment company that owns and operates iconic venues including Madison Square Garden, Radio City Music Hall, and the Beacon Theatre, and produces the Christmas Spectacular Starring the Radio City Rockettes. It generates revenue from ticket sales, venue license fees, sponsorships, suite licenses, and food, beverage, and merchandise sales, serving audiences, corporate clients, and third-party promoters.

exposures.sentence: business, reputational and litigation risk if there is a cyber or other security incident resulting in loss, disclosure or misappropriation of stored personal information, or disclosure of confidential information or other breaches of our information security;
